lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well met, fellow adventurer.

lines.speaker: Andros Mai
lines.text: Adventurer? I am no mere Adventurer, I am Andros Mai, brother of the Holy Order of Saradomin. You would do well to greet me with respect.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Andros Mai? Sorry, but I can't say I've heard of you I'm afraid.

lines.speaker: Andros Mai
lines.text: I wouldn't have expected someone of your... stature to know of me.

lines.speaker: Andros Mai
lines.text: Tell me, what do you know of the vile Vet'ion?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing, but I have a feeling you're about to fill me in.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: We've crossed swords in the past, I can't say I'm too keen to do it again though.

lines.speaker: Andros Mai
lines.text: You challenged him and came out unscathed? Impossible.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm stronger than I look.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But why do you ask? What do you want with Vet'ion?

lines.speaker: Andros Mai
lines.text: Vet'ion was a devout follower of the heretical god Zamorak. It is the will of my order and my duty as a follower of the true god Saradomin to end his tyranny.

lines.speaker: Andros Mai
lines.text: After many years in my order's libraries, I stumbled upon an old tome which mentioned Vet'ion's final resting place, which I believe to be his source of power.

lines.speaker: Andros Mai
lines.text: His very existence is an insult to my lord Saradomin and I will not suffer it to exist any longer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Then why are you waiting here? Seems to me that you don't want to face Vet'ion.

lines.speaker: Andros Mai
lines.text: I have no fear of Vet'ion!

lines.speaker: Andros Mai
lines.text: I am merely meditating and preparing for the battle. I need to focus my mind before going out to find his resting place.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's okay, sometimes I pretend to be busy when there's something I don't want to do, too.

lines.speaker: Andros Mai
lines.text: This conversation is over! Leave me before I lose my temper.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey. Do you know anything about this?

lines.speaker: Andros Mai
lines.text: By Saradomin! That's a Zamorakian made chainmace you have there!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And? Do you know anything about it?

lines.speaker: Andros Mai
lines.text: I know melee weapons in general. Well enough to know most of them can be upgraded.

lines.speaker: Andros Mai
lines.text: Perhaps with something sharp to give it more impact as it swings around.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting! I'll be on the lookout for a powerful enhancement like that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey. Do you know anything about this?

lines.speaker: Andros Mai
lines.text: They look like powerful claws. You could probably attach them to a weapon to make the weapon stronger.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting! I'll be on the lookout for that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey. Do you know anything about this?

lines.speaker: Andros Mai
lines.text: By Saradomin! That's a Zamorakian made chainmace you have there!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And? Do you know anything about it?

lines.speaker: Andros Mai
lines.text: I know melee weapons in general. Well enough to know most of them can be upgraded.

lines.speaker: Andros Mai
lines.text: Perhaps with something sharp to give it more impact as it swings around.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Perhaps I could use this?

lines.speaker: Andros Mai
lines.text: Yes. Those look like they could be attached to the weapon.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you combine them?

lines.speaker: Andros Mai
lines.text: While I could, I'd really not like to.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Surely you could consider it... For the right price?

lines.speaker: Andros Mai
lines.text: Money has been tight lately...

lines.speaker: Andros Mai
lines.text: And my supplies are running low...

lines.speaker: Andros Mai
lines.text: Fine. But I want 500,000 coins for that. No less.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have the money for that.

lines.speaker: Andros Mai
lines.text: Feel free to come back when you do.

lines.speaker: Andros Mai
lines.text: There we go! All done.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey. Do you know anything about this?

lines.speaker: Andros Mai
lines.text: No. I'm afraid not. They just look like fangs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fangs indeed. Rather useless it seems.

lines.speaker: Andros Mai
lines.text: Perhaps not. I've seen that Derse Venator guy over there handle similar items. Perhaps he knows more.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey. Do you know anything about this?

lines.speaker: Andros Mai
lines.text: That's him! The vile Vet'Ion. I should like to smash this skull!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wait! It seems to still contain some magic. Surely we can use it?

lines.speaker: Andros Mai
lines.text: The only thing his skull would be useful for is Zamorakian heresy. I won't stand for it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there really nothing you can do to help me with this?

lines.speaker: Andros Mai
lines.text: Do you see Phabelle over there? Despite her questionable morals, she's my friend.

lines.speaker: Andros Mai
lines.text: She's good with magic and may know how to take advantage of the powers in that skull.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey. Do you know anything about this?

lines.speaker: Andros Mai
lines.text: No, I'm afraid not.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh. Do you know someone who might know more?

lines.speaker: Andros Mai
lines.text: Downstairs you can find Madam Sikaro. Though she's on the wrong path, perhaps she could assist you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!
